name: Bodyweight Squat
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body by bending knees and hips until thighs are parallel to ground. Push through heels to stand back up.

name: Conventional Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart, bar over mid-foot. Bend knees, grip bar shoulder-width apart. Drive through heels to stand, pulling bar up legs.

name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on flat bench, feet on floor. Grip bar slightly wider than shoulder-width. Lower bar to chest, press back up explosively.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Bend forward at hips, knees slightly bent. Grip bar shoulder-width, pull to lower chest, squeeze shoulder blades together.

name: Pull-up
instructions: Hang from bar with grip slightly wider than shoulder-width. Pull body up until chin clears bar. Lower with control.

name: Push-up
instructions: Start in plank position. Lower body until chest nearly touches ground. Push back up to starting position.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on flat bench holding dumbbells at shoulder height. Press dumbbells up, pause at top, lower with control.

name: Dumbbell Row
instructions: Place knee on bench. Hold dumbbell in opposite hand. Row dumbbell to hip, squeeze back muscle, lower with control.

name: Walking Lunges
instructions: Step forward with one leg, lower hips until both knees bend to 90 degrees. Push back to starting position, alternate legs.

name: Plank Hold
instructions: Assume position with forearms on ground, elbows under shoulders. Keep body in straight line. Hold position.

name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells at sides with palms forward. Curl dumbbells to shoulders, lower with control.

name: Tricep Dips
instructions: Use parallel bars or bench. Lower body by bending elbows. Push back up to starting position.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit or stand holding dumbbells at shoulder height. Press dumbbells overhead, lower with control.

name: Leg Press Machine
instructions: Sit in machine, feet on platform shoulder-width apart. Lower platform until legs at 90 degrees. Press back up.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Sit at machine with bar overhead. Pull bar down to chest, focusing on back muscles. Release with control.

name: Cable Chest Fly
instructions: Stand between cable towers. Grab handles at chest height. Bring handles together in arc motion.

name: Lying Leg Curl
instructions: Lie face down on machine. Curl legs up towards glutes. Lower with control.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Sit on machine, feet under pad. Extend legs fully, pause at top. Lower with control.

name: Preacher Curl
instructions: Rest upper arms on preacher bench. Curl barbell towards face. Lower with control.

name: Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Hold rope at chest height. Push down until arms fully extended. Return to starting position.

name: Treadmill Running
instructions: Step on treadmill, set speed. Run at steady pace maintaining steady breathing.

name: Stationary Cycling
instructions: Adjust bike to fit. Pedal at moderate to high intensity maintaining steady cadence.

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Hold rope handles, jump over rope with both feet. Maintain steady rhythm.

name: Rowing Machine
instructions: Sit on rower, strap feet in. Drive with legs, pull handle to chest, extend.

name: Burpees
instructions: Squat down, place hands on ground, jump back to plank, jump back in, jump up.

name: Mountain Climbers
instructions: Start in plank position. Bring knees to chest alternating quickly.

name: High Knees Running
instructions: Run in place, bring knees up to hip height, maintain quick pace.

name: Battle Ropes
instructions: Hold rope ends, slam down alternating arms quickly.

name: Box Jumps
instructions: Stand facing box. Jump onto box with both feet, step down.

name: Elliptical Machine
instructions: Step on machine, place hands on handles. Move feet in elliptical pattern.

name: Jump Squats
instructions: Squat down, jump up explosively, land softly and repeat.

name: Standing Forward Fold
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart. Fold forward at hips, let arms hang. Hold 30 seconds.

name: Quad Stretch
instructions: Stand on one leg, pull ankle to glutes. Keep knees together. Hold 30 seconds each.

name: Hip Flexor Stretch
instructions: Lunge position, press hips forward. Feel stretch in front of hip. Hold 30 seconds each side.

name: Butterfly Stretch
instructions: Sit on ground, bring soles of feet together. Press knees toward ground gently. Hold 30 seconds.

name: Seated Spinal Twist
instructions: Sit, cross one leg over knee. Pull knee to chest, twist torso. Hold 30 seconds each.

name: Cross-body Shoulder Stretch
instructions: Pull one arm across chest at shoulder height. Hold 30 seconds each.

name: Chest Stretch
instructions: Clasp hands behind back, straighten arms, lift chest. Hold 30 seconds.

name: Tricep Stretch
instructions: Reach one arm over shoulder, bend elbow behind head. Pull gently. Hold 30 seconds each.

name: Pigeon Pose
instructions: Front leg bent in front of body, back leg extended. Fold forward. Hold 1 minute each.

name: Downward Dog
instructions: Hands and feet on ground, hips high, head between arms. Hold position.

name: Child's Pose
instructions: Kneel, sit hips back to heels, extend arms forward. Hold 1 minute.

name: Yoga Flow
instructions: Flow through sun salutations and various yoga poses. 30-45 minutes.

name: Pilates Reformer
instructions: Use reformer machine to perform controlled pilates movements.

name: Foam Rolling
instructions: Use foam roller on muscle groups, roll slowly back and forth.

name: Lacrosse Ball Release
instructions: Roll lacrosse ball on tight spots, apply pressure. 5-10 minutes.

name: Resistance Band Pull-Aparts
instructions: Hold band at chest level, pull ends apart. 3 sets of 15 reps.

name: Shoulder Dislocates
instructions: Hold band wide, rotate band over head and behind body.

name: Leg Swings
instructions: Hold onto support, swing one leg forward and back. 15 each direction.

name: Arm Circles
instructions: Extend arms, make small circles forward then backward.

name: Hip Circles
instructions: Hands on hips, make large circles with hips clockwise then counter-clockwise.

name: Wrist Mobility Drills
instructions: Rotate wrists, flex and extend, perform wrist circles.

name: Glute Activation
instructions: Perform band walks, lateral raises, and clamshells. 15 reps each.

name: Scapular Push-ups
instructions: In plank position, squeeze shoulder blades, release. No arm bending.

name: Jumping Jacks
instructions: Jump feet apart while raising arms, return to starting position.

name: Bicycle Crunches
instructions: Lie on back, bring elbow to opposite knee in pedaling motion.

name: Dead Bug
instructions: Lie on back with arms up and knees bent. Lower opposite arm and leg. Alternate.

name: Hollow Body Hold
instructions: Lie on back, press lower back to ground, body in slight hollow shape. Hold 30-60 seconds.

name: Cable Wood Chop
instructions: Hold cable at chest, rotate across body diagonally. Control movement.

name: Sled Push
instructions: Place hands on sled, push forward explosively. Walk back and repeat.

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Hold kettlebell with both hands, swing between legs then hip height. Explosive movement.

name: Medicine Ball Slam
instructions: Hold medicine ball overhead, slam to ground explosively. Catch and repeat.

name: Renegade Rows
instructions: Plank position with hands on dumbbells. Row one dumbbell to hip, alternate.

name: Push Press
instructions: Hold barbell at shoulders, dip down with legs, press overhead explosively.

name: Clean and Jerk
instructions: Pull barbell from ground to shoulders, then press overhead. Complex compound movement.
